curve_panels_subplot: The image shows a multi-panel line figure. Each subplot has labeled methods, shared x-axis ticks, and plotted markers.
The figure shows several labeled line-chart subplots with shared method labels and x-axis values.
The visual shows a multi-panel line plot with labeled subplots and method curves.
The chart shows multiple line-plot panels with the same method labels repeated across panels.
The panel shows a grid of curve plots with labeled subplots, markers, and method legends.

curve_at_x_extremum_label: In subplot {panel_label}, at x = {x_value}, which method has the highest y-value?
At x = {x_value} in subplot {panel_label}, which method reaches the largest value?
For subplot {panel_label}, identify the method with the maximum y-value at x = {x_value}.
Looking only at subplot {panel_label}, which method is highest at x = {x_value}?
Which method has the largest plotted marker value at x = {x_value} in subplot {panel_label}?
above_threshold_series_count: In subplot {panel_label}, how many methods are above y = {threshold_value} at x = {x_value}?
At x = {x_value} in subplot {panel_label}, count the methods whose y-value is greater than {threshold_value}.
For subplot {panel_label}, how many method markers exceed y = {threshold_value} at x = {x_value}?
Using subplot {panel_label}, count the methods above y = {threshold_value} at x = {x_value}.
How many curves in subplot {panel_label} are above y = {threshold_value} at x = {x_value}?
below_threshold_series_count: In subplot {panel_label}, how many methods are below y = {threshold_value} at x = {x_value}?
At x = {x_value} in subplot {panel_label}, count the methods whose y-value is less than {threshold_value}.
For subplot {panel_label}, how many method markers are under y = {threshold_value} at x = {x_value}?
Using subplot {panel_label}, count the methods below y = {threshold_value} at x = {x_value}.
How many curves in subplot {panel_label} are below y = {threshold_value} at x = {x_value}?
cross_panel_delta_extremum_label: For method {method_label}, which subplot has the largest increase from x = {start_x_value} to x = {end_x_value}? {unanswerable_instruction}
Across subplots, where does method {method_label} increase the most between x = {start_x_value} and x = {end_x_value}? {unanswerable_instruction}
Compare method {method_label} in every subplot: which subplot shows the greatest y-value gain from x = {start_x_value} to x = {end_x_value}? {unanswerable_instruction}
Which subplot has the biggest rise for method {method_label} from x = {start_x_value} through x = {end_x_value}? {unanswerable_instruction}
Using method {method_label}, find the subplot with the maximum upward change between x = {start_x_value} and x = {end_x_value}. {unanswerable_instruction}
overall_maximum_value_panel_label: Which subplot contains the single highest plotted marker value across the whole figure?
Across every subplot and method, which subplot has the overall maximum marker value?
Find the subplot containing the highest y-value visible anywhere in the figure.
Considering all panels and curves, which subplot includes the largest plotted marker?
Which subplot has the global maximum y-value among all visible markers?
overall_minimum_value_panel_label: Which subplot contains the single lowest plotted marker value across the whole figure?
Across every subplot and method, which subplot has the overall minimum marker value?
Find the subplot containing the lowest y-value visible anywhere in the figure.
Considering all panels and curves, which subplot includes the smallest plotted marker?
Which subplot has the global minimum y-value among all visible markers?
curve_intersection_count: In subplot {panel_label}, how many times do methods {method_a_label} and {method_b_label} intersect?
Count the intersections between {method_a_label} and {method_b_label} in subplot {panel_label}.
Within subplot {panel_label}, what is the number of crossings between methods {method_a_label} and {method_b_label}?
How many crossing points are formed by {method_a_label} and {method_b_label} in subplot {panel_label}?
Looking at subplot {panel_label}, count where {method_a_label} and {method_b_label} cross each other.
earliest_maximum_panel_label: For method {method_label}, each subplot has its own maximum point. Which subplot reaches that maximum at the smallest x-axis value?
Across subplots, which subplot has the earliest x-position of the maximum for method {method_label}?
For method {method_label}, identify the subplot where its maximum occurs at the lowest x-value.
Which subplot reaches its own method {method_label} maximum first along the x-axis?
Using method {method_label} in every subplot, which subplot has the maximum marker at the smallest x-value?
start_highest_panel_label: For method {method_label}, which subplot has the highest starting marker?
Compare the first marker of method {method_label} across subplots. Which subplot is highest?
Which subplot starts highest for method {method_label}?
At the leftmost x-value, which subplot has the largest y-value for method {method_label}?
Using method {method_label}, identify the subplot with the highest first point.
start_lowest_panel_label: For method {method_label}, which subplot has the lowest starting marker?
Compare the first marker of method {method_label} across subplots. Which subplot is lowest?
Which subplot starts lowest for method {method_label}?
At the leftmost x-value, which subplot has the smallest y-value for method {method_label}?
Using method {method_label}, identify the subplot with the lowest first point.
end_highest_panel_label: For method {method_label}, which subplot has the highest ending marker?
Compare the last marker of method {method_label} across subplots. Which subplot is highest?
Which subplot ends highest for method {method_label}?
At the rightmost x-value, which subplot has the largest y-value for method {method_label}?
Using method {method_label}, identify the subplot with the highest last point.
end_lowest_panel_label: For method {method_label}, which subplot has the lowest ending marker?
Compare the last marker of method {method_label} across subplots. Which subplot is lowest?
Which subplot ends lowest for method {method_label}?
At the rightmost x-value, which subplot has the smallest y-value for method {method_label}?
Using method {method_label}, identify the subplot with the lowest last point.
largest_panel_spread_label: Which subplot has the largest spread between its lowest and highest plotted marker values?
Across subplots, which one has the widest range of visible marker y-values?
Find the subplot with the greatest difference between its minimum and maximum plotted markers.
Which subplot shows the largest vertical spread among all its markers?
Considering every method marker in each subplot, which subplot has the biggest value range?
smallest_panel_spread_label: Which subplot has the smallest spread between its lowest and highest plotted marker values?
Across subplots, which one has the narrowest range of visible marker y-values?
Find the subplot with the smallest difference between its minimum and maximum plotted markers.
Which subplot shows the smallest vertical spread among all its markers?
Considering every method marker in each subplot, which subplot has the smallest value range?
panel_curve_upward_threshold_crossing_co: In subplot {panel_label}, how many method curves cross {threshold_crossing_phrase} y = {threshold_value}?
Looking only at subplot {panel_label}, count the curves that pass {threshold_crossing_phrase} the y = {threshold_value} guide.
For subplot {panel_label}, what is the number of method lines crossing {threshold_crossing_phrase} y = {threshold_value}?
Using subplot {panel_label}, count each curve that crosses {threshold_crossing_phrase} the threshold y = {threshold_value}.
Within subplot {panel_label}, how many method curves cross {threshold_crossing_phrase} y = {threshold_value}?
panel_curve_downward_threshold_crossing_: In subplot {panel_label}, how many method curves cross {threshold_crossing_phrase} y = {threshold_value}?
Looking only at subplot {panel_label}, count the curves that pass {threshold_crossing_phrase} the y = {threshold_value} guide.
For subplot {panel_label}, what is the number of method lines crossing {threshold_crossing_phrase} y = {threshold_value}?
Using subplot {panel_label}, count each curve that crosses {threshold_crossing_phrase} the threshold y = {threshold_value}.
Within subplot {panel_label}, how many method curves cross {threshold_crossing_phrase} y = {threshold_value}?
cross_panel_upward_threshold_earliest_la: For method {method_label}, which subplot crosses {threshold_crossing_phrase} y = {threshold_value} at the smallest x-axis value?
Across subplots, where does method {method_label} first cross {threshold_crossing_phrase} the y = {threshold_value} guide?
Compare method {method_label} in every subplot: which subplot has the earliest crossing {threshold_crossing_phrase} y = {threshold_value}?
Which subplot shows method {method_label} crossing {threshold_crossing_phrase} the threshold y = {threshold_value} at the lowest x-value?
Using method {method_label}, identify the subplot with the leftmost crossing {threshold_crossing_phrase} y = {threshold_value}.
cross_panel_downward_threshold_earliest_: For method {method_label}, which subplot crosses {threshold_crossing_phrase} y = {threshold_value} at the smallest x-axis value?
Across subplots, where does method {method_label} first cross {threshold_crossing_phrase} the y = {threshold_value} guide?
Compare method {method_label} in every subplot: which subplot has the earliest crossing {threshold_crossing_phrase} y = {threshold_value}?
Which subplot shows method {method_label} crossing {threshold_crossing_phrase} the threshold y = {threshold_value} at the lowest x-value?
Using method {method_label}, identify the subplot with the leftmost crossing {threshold_crossing_phrase} y = {threshold_value}.

query:curve_at_x_extremum_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible method label as a string
query:curve_at_x_extremum_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x,y] pixel point on the answer method marker at the requested x-value

query:above_threshold_series_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested count as an integer
query:above_threshold_series_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points on the method markers that satisfy the threshold at the requested x-value

query:below_threshold_series_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested count as an integer
query:below_threshold_series_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points on the method markers that satisfy the threshold at the requested x-value

query:cross_panel_delta_extremum_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible subplot label as a string, or "unanswerable" if the requested method is not plotted in every subplot
query:cross_panel_delta_extremum_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object mapping "start_point" and "end_point" to [x,y] pixel points on the answer subplot's selected method markers; if the answer is "unanswerable", use an empty object

query:overall_maximum_value_panel_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible subplot label as a string
query:overall_maximum_value_panel_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x,y] pixel point on the overall maximum marker

query:overall_minimum_value_panel_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible subplot label as a string
query:overall_minimum_value_panel_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x,y] pixel point on the overall minimum marker

query:curve_intersection_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested count as an integer
query:curve_intersection_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points at the visible intersections of the two requested methods; use an empty array if there are no intersections

query:earliest_maximum_panel_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible subplot label as a string
query:earliest_maximum_panel_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x,y] pixel point on the answer subplot's maximum marker for the requested method

query:start_highest_panel_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible subplot label as a string
query:start_highest_panel_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x,y] pixel point on the answer subplot's selected endpoint marker

query:start_lowest_panel_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible subplot label as a string
query:start_lowest_panel_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x,y] pixel point on the answer subplot's selected endpoint marker

query:end_highest_panel_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible subplot label as a string
query:end_highest_panel_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x,y] pixel point on the answer subplot's selected endpoint marker

query:end_lowest_panel_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible subplot label as a string
query:end_lowest_panel_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x,y] pixel point on the answer subplot's selected endpoint marker

query:largest_panel_spread_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible subplot label as a string
query:largest_panel_spread_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object mapping "min_point" and "max_point" to [x,y] pixel points on the answer subplot's minimum and maximum markers

query:smallest_panel_spread_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible subplot label as a string
query:smallest_panel_spread_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object mapping "min_point" and "max_point" to [x,y] pixel points on the answer subplot's minimum and maximum markers

query:panel_curve_upward_threshold_cross.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested count as an integer
query:panel_curve_upward_threshold_cross.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points on every curve-threshold crossing in the requested subplot

query:panel_curve_downward_threshold_cro.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested count as an integer
query:panel_curve_downward_threshold_cro.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points on every curve-threshold crossing in the requested subplot

query:cross_panel_upward_threshold_earli.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible subplot label as a string
query:cross_panel_upward_threshold_earli.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x,y] pixel point at the answer subplot's threshold crossing

query:cross_panel_downward_threshold_ear.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible subplot label as a string
query:cross_panel_downward_threshold_ear.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x,y] pixel point at the answer subplot's threshold crossing
